body_txt: If looks could kill... these can! A Stock Superpower (and also a classic Super Robot weapon) that allows characters to shoot blasts out of their eyes. Blasts of what, you ask? Sometimes the generic, all-encompassing term of " energy ." Sometimes "heat," in which case it is (logically) known as Heat Vision. Sometimes "lasers," in which case it is known (again, with excessive logic) as Laser Vision. The point is, they hurt. These are the real Glowing Eyes of Doom . This is the stock power of the Mecha Mook and those with powers beyond mortal men. Also, a stock joke about "laser eye surgery" fad. This ability also tends to be a common element "eye monster" designs, that being creatures visually or conceptually dominated by their eyes, which perhaps ironically means that it's just as frequently seen wielded by Faceless Eyes , for whom this may be their only form of attack, and Cyclopes as by creatures with Extra Eyes — just about anything where the number of eyes does not equal two, really. Things with many eyes in particular may be able to fire a beam with a different effect from each eyeball. Seldom is it explained how a beam which can burn or injure just about anything else is contained when trapped behind the character's eye lids , nor how the beam-producing mechanism within the eye avoids obstructing the vision of the actual seeing parts of the eye. Compare X-Ray Vision , Deadly Gaze , Magical Eye , Breath Weapon , Head Blast , Hand Blast , and Psi Blast . Often The Glasses Come Off for this. A favorite attack for the Oculothorax . Not to be confused with I-beams, the architectural element, although those too can be used as weapons .
